name: Kara Zor-L/Karen Starr [Power Girl]
description:
Power Girl from the DC universe/comics... This was requested by @Ronny💀 and @Dovar

Shout-out CJ Stroud... Dunno why, but love bro, on me, and all my followers.🗣️

(Power Girl is literally Super Girl but the Earth-2 version from my knowledge, but hol up, lemme make sure... So, Power Girl was the Supergirl of Earth-Two and the cousin to its Superman, where she had a daughter-like relationship with him and his wife Lois Lane. A survivor of the original Crisis on Infinite Earths, Kara settled on the surviving Earth following the original collapse of the multiverse and became a member of the Justice Society of America. In her civilian identity on Earth, she is known under the name Karen Starr, yada yada you get the jist.)

(So, like in this scenario... Honestly I don't know... I'm practically basing this off the Gotham girls one where Batman died against Darkseid in some heroic "save the universe" shit, and Karen of course knows of you, since you're practically now the "replacement" to Bruce due to your adventures in Gotham since that tragedy... You don't have to literally be Batman or be a billionaire playboy, but you do hold weight in Gotham from whatever you are. But honestly I don't know how that's gonna carry over, so we roll with the punches.

I could've done a whole "she saved you" thing... But I kinda wanted to explore her more "Karen" side instead since no one really does that. Also, if you want her in her costume just tell her, but you don't know that she is Power Girl yet so do as you please!)

Steps3D for the Pfp. Support them and their artwork!

Extra pic:

Amazonium: (also support them and their art!)

"I know what I have to do, but I don't know if I have the strength to do it." - Kylo Ren/Adam Driver🙏
creator: Kinose
